Name: Carrollton School of the Sacred Heart
Tagline: Home - Carrollton School of the Sacred Heart
About: Carrollton School of the Sacred Heart is led by two leaders who work in collaboration to bring Carrollton into the future. The Head of School leads the academic life of the school, counseling and student life.
Philosophy: Madeleine Sophie Barat founded the Society of the Sacred Heart in France, Religious of the Society of the Sacred Heart and lay Sacred Heart educators have carried out her vision of educational excellence. Today, the Network of Sacred Heart schools is an association of 25 Catholic schools across the United States and Canada, and nearly 160 schools internationally.
Outcomes: Carrollton School of the Sacred Heart graduates consistently gain admission to prestigious universities such as Harvard, Yale, and Stanford. The school has a strong record in national academic competitions, with students frequently earning top honors in science and mathematics.
Admissions: The following items are required before the Admissions Committee can consider an applicant’s file complete: *To schedule the Observation and Evaluation Day, steps 1-4 of the application on the Carrollton Admissions portal must be completed. Upon receipt of your application, we will schedule the academic/family interview.
Quote: Carrollton School of the Sacred Heart is proud...

Performance.Coaching Credentials: Carrollton School of the Sacred Heart employs educators with advanced degrees and certifications in their respective fields, ensuring a high level of expertise in subjects like STEM and humanities. Teachers frequently participate in professional development workshops to stay updated with educational trends.
Performance.Student Wellbeing: The school offers a comprehensive counseling program with licensed professionals to support students' mental and emotional health. Additionally, advisory groups foster community building and provide personalized guidance throughout the school year.
Performance.Academic Integration: Carrollton's curriculum includes Advanced Placement courses and interdisciplinary projects, emphasizing critical thinking and problem-solving skills. The school employs a student-centered approach, integrating technology and experiential learning into daily lessons.
Performance.Competitive Pathway: Graduates of Carrollton School of the Sacred Heart are regularly admitted to Ivy League universities and have achieved top honors in national science and math competitions. The school boasts a strong alumni network supporting diverse career pathways.
Performance.Facilities & Resources: The campus features state-of-the-art science labs, a performing arts center, and athletic facilities including a swimming pool and tennis courts. These resources support a well-rounded educational experience for all students.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: Carrollton utilizes a robust assessment system with regular progress reports and parent-teacher conferences to ensure student success. Continuous feedback mechanisms help tailor educational strategies to individual student needs.
